cc:Work.dc:title: Box - ABox
cc:Work.dc:description:
A simple Box
This box is kept simple on purpose. If you need more features have a look at the UniversalBox.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes ABox --y=60 --Lid_style=flatbrim Command line short: boxes ABox --y=60 --Lid_style=flatbrim
